title: Peek-a-Boo Colors with Sage
synopsis: Baby Sage discovers colorful friends hiding behind bright blankets in this interactive peek-a-boo adventure. Each page reveals a new color and animal friend, teaching colors while engaging babies with predictable peek-a-boo fun and gentle sound words.

illustration.description: Baby Sage with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits on a soft cream carpet, giggling with his hands covering his eyes in peek-a-boo position. He wears a light blue onesie and has bright, sparkling dark eyes. The background is a gentle pastel yellow nursery with soft natural lighting.
illustration.alt: Baby Sage playing peek-a-boo with hands over eyes

illustration.description: A bright red blanket with soft rounded edges fills most of the frame, gently flowing as if being lifted. Sage's curious face peeks from the corner with wide, excited eyes. The blanket has a watercolor texture with high contrast red against a pale cream background.
illustration.alt: Red blanket being lifted with Sage peeking around the corner

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Red bird says chirp chirp!

illustration.description: A friendly red cardinal with oversized, gentle eyes and soft rounded features sits on Sage's outstretched finger. Sage beams with joy, his mouth open in delight. The bird has fluffy, stylized feathers in warm red tones. Background is soft white with subtle yellow accents.
illustration.alt: Sage holding a cute red bird on his finger

illustration.description: A flowing blue blanket in gentle watercolor style moves across the page, with Sage's small hands visible at the bottom edge, ready to lift it. The blue has varying soft tones from sky blue to deeper azure. Simple white background with soft shadows beneath the blanket.
illustration.alt: Blue blanket with Sage's hands ready to lift it

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Blue bunny says hop hop!

illustration.description: A plump, powder blue bunny with enormous friendly eyes sits next to Sage, who claps his hands in excitement. The bunny has soft, rounded ears and a tiny pink nose. Sage's expression is pure joy with his mouth in an 'O' of surprise. Gentle lavender background with white highlights.
illustration.alt: Sage clapping next to a blue bunny

illustration.description: A sunny yellow blanket with watercolor texture billows gently, caught mid-movement. Sage's excited face appears at the side, his eyes wide with anticipation. The yellow is warm and glowing, like sunshine, against a soft peachy-pink background with subtle cloud shapes.
illustration.alt: Yellow blanket moving with Sage watching excitedly

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Yellow duck says quack quack!

illustration.description: A cheerful yellow duckling with bright orange beak and large, sparkling eyes sits in Sage's lap. Sage giggles with his head tilted back slightly, showing pure happiness. The duck has soft, fluffy texture and rounded features. Background is pale mint green with gentle white accents.
illustration.alt: Sage laughing while holding a yellow duck

illustration.description: Sage sits in the center surrounded by all three animal friends - the red bird perched nearby, blue bunny on one side, and yellow duck on the other. Everyone has happy, content expressions. The background features soft rainbow pastels blending together in watercolor style, creating a warm, joyful atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Sage surrounded by his red bird, blue bunny, and yellow duck friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What color is the bird?
questions.explanation: The bird is red and says chirp chirp!

questions.question: What sound does the duck make?
questions.explanation: The yellow duck says quack quack!

questions.question: What does the bunny do?
questions.explanation: The blue bunny says hop hop!
